meaning: n.[药]苏拉明,苏拉灭(一种抗锥虫及丝虫药)
examples: Trypanocidal drug suramin is polysulfated and gives a positive alcian blue reaction even at pH 1.
Dr Naviaux is not suggesting using suramin itself to treat people with autism.
The drug suramin, which is used to kill invading trypanosomes, is accumulated in lysosomes.
